case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL VS. ROBERT BRYAN LEWIS et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL, NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED AND ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,685.00. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL, Notice of Hearing on Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Arbitration award is confirmed and attorney fees and costs are awarded in the amount of $2,685.00. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
